title: eriogonum umbellatum var. croceum
intro: Eriogonum umbellatum var. croceum, also known as sulphur buckwheat or desert buckwheat, is a flowering plant species in the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are believed to have antioxidant, anti-cancer, and anti-aging properties. Eriogonum umbellatum var. croceum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
